computeBalance(uint256[],uint256,uint256.details: Uses rated balances for consistency with swaps and invariant calculations.

params.balancesLiveScaled18: Current live balances, adjusted for rates.
params.invariantRatio: Ratio of the new invariant to the old.
params.tokenInIndex: Index of the token to compute the balance for.

returns.newBalance: The new balance of the selected token, scaled to 18 decimals.

computeInvariant(uint256[],uint8).details: Uses the current (possibly interpolated) amplification parameter.

params.balancesLiveScaled18: Token balances after applying decimal scaling and rates.
params.rounding: Rounding direction for the invariant calculation.

returns.invariant: The calculated invariant, scaled to 18 decimals.

returns.endValue: Ending amplification value for current/last transition.
returns.startValue: Starting amplification value for current/last transition.

getRawAmplificationState().details: Useful for testing to verify storage state.

onSwap((uint8,uint256,uint256[],uint256,.details: Uses the current (possibly interpolated) amplification parameter.

params.params: Swap parameters, including balancesScaled18 adjusted by rates.

returns.amountCalculatedScaled18: Calculated amount for the swap in scaled 18-decimal format.

computeBalance(uint256[],uint256,uint256.notice: Computes the new balance of a token after an operation.

computeInvariant(uint256[],uint8).notice: Computes and returns the pool's invariant using stable math.

getAmplificationState().notice: Get the full amplification state including transition parameters.

getRawAmplificationState().notice: Get the raw amplification state directly from storage.

initialize(uint256).notice: Initialize the stub with an amplification parameter.

onSwap((uint8,uint256,uint256[],uint256,.notice: Execute a swap in the pool using stable math.
